summary: Outstanding 1983 concert featuring a blistering Alabama Getaway and scorching Minglewood Blues, captured in an excellent recording.
review: Both reviewers rave that this show was one of the best of ’83, highlighting Bobby’s raunchy slide solo on Minglewood Blues and a blistering Alabama Getaway. Garcia’s fuzzy‑distorted leads and strong vocals are praised, and the recording is described as great – clear enough to be enjoyed on headphones. Overall it’s an energetic, high‑quality performance with a solid, listenable source.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are five‑star and emphasize exceptional musical performance plus a great‑sounding recording; the limited number of reviews (2) lowers confidence to medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the recording as “great” and note it sounds fantastic on headphones, indicating clear and well‑balanced audio despite no explicit source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High energy throughout; the band was “firing on all cylinders,” delivering strong vocals and tight playing despite a few minor flubs.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s fuzz‑distorted lead guitar tone is highlighted as fantastic.
band_member_comments.Bob: Bobby (Bob) delivers an incredibly raunchy slide solo on Minglewood Blues.
